plugins.name: rockstarr-content
plugins.description: Rockstarr AI long-form drafting plugin. Four publishing lanes (researched blog, thought leadership, email newsletter, LinkedIn newsletter) gated by the client's stack cadence, plus interview-driven case studies and repurposed derivatives. Every lane drafts in the client's approved voice from first-party knowledge base material; third-party sources live in References only. Every prose output runs through the shared stop-slop skill as a mandatory final pass before landing in 03_drafts/content/. Monthly planning pass (ideate → pick → calendar → approve) then per-piece drafting on the calendar's schedule. Requires rockstarr-infra v0.4+ for content-cadence stack fields, the shared case-study prompt, and the shared stop-slop skill.

plugins.name: rockstarr-infra
plugins.description: Rockstarr AI infrastructure plugin. Scaffolds the per-client folder, ingests the workbook, generates the style guide, runs the knowledge base, and exposes shared utilities every Rockstarr bot depends on.

plugins.name: rockstarr-outreach-interceptly
plugins.description: Rockstarr AI LinkedIn outreach plugin for clients who run Interceptly. Owns the Interceptly integration end-to-end: account discovery, per-account persona capture, campaign lifecycle (draft, launch, pause, stop), multi-account session confirmation, the daily inbox + tasks loop, per-reply channel I/O (send, label, follow-up task, meeting proposal, booking), and outreach-side metrics + weekly reporting. Hands every inbound reply to rockstarr-reply for drafting and operator approval, then executes the returned bundle inside Interceptly.

plugins.name: rockstarr-outreach-salesnav
plugins.description: Rockstarr AI LinkedIn outreach plugin for clients who will not install Interceptly / MeetAlfred / Dripify / Waalaxy. Plans multi-touch campaigns against a client-supplied ICP and saved Sales Navigator search, executes the daily outreach loop directly in Sales Nav via Chrome MCP, and keeps all state in a single workbook inside /rockstarr-ai/. Enforces a 20/day + 100/week connection cap across campaigns, routes every reply through rockstarr-reply for approval, and confirms the browser is signed in to the correct LinkedIn before every run.

plugins.name: rockstarr-reply
plugins.description: Rockstarr AI channel-agnostic reply drafting for the Growth OS. Called by every rockstarr-outreach-* plugin to draft replies to inbound LinkedIn messages. Owns voice, classification, three-option non-ICP flow, stop-slop pass, and the 'send it' authorization gate. The caller owns the channel I/O.
